creator: sfilter@sulfegate.org
text: Any chance of https://reviews.freebsd.org/D3133 getting committed?  I can confirm this is still a problem on stable/11 (r306832).  My machine was deadlocking in if_carp in as little as an hour (though usually would take more like 7 - 9 hours).  After applying D3133, I'm on 53 hours and counting with no more deadlocks.
